title: Our
subtitle: Two environments designed for each age group, united under the same philosophy.

creche.name: La P'tite Crèche Ingeri
creche.desc: A cosy, safe space for little ones from 6 to 24 months — designed to support every stage of their development with love and gentleness.

maternelle.intlStrip: French national curriculum · Montessori pedagogy · Bilingual & international teaching
maternelle.name: Ingeri International School
maternelle.desc: A dynamic campus for children aged 3 to 5. We follow the French national curriculum while integrating active pedagogy and Christian values in an international and open environment.
